headline: Biggest shipping day yet — 8 features/fixes live, 6 posts publishing, but the 06:00 standup itself failed to deliver (needs one owner click)
summary: Standup delivery failure, owned honestly: the 06:00 cloud run fired on time, wrote its report, and was refused push access to the repo (403). The report died in its sandbox — you got nothing at 06:00. Root cause: the cloud environment has read-only repo access. Fix is one owner click (direction below). Today's report was written by the CEO directly.

Since yesterday's standup, shipped and live: event poster + one-tap share v2 (Instagram-story format, scannable join QR, Instagram/WhatsApp/Facebook/TikTok/X buttons, hover download icon), location map picker (tap/drag pin + wheel zoom), anonymous click analytics with an HQ funnel section, accurate form validation messages, field-alignment fix, and the canonical-domain fix — production env vars pointed at the old sport-date vercel alias; every invitation/poster/email link now uses keepitup.social.
Copy rule enforced: 'Europe-first' removed from every member-visible surface (tests now block it from coming back). Tagline: open worldwide · GDPR-grade privacy for everyone.

Marketing: 6 approved posts queued to Buffer (2 Instagram + 4 TikTok, publishing Mon-Tue). Batch 09 (10 poster-branded revisions answering every owner comment) waits in Pending. Batch 10 (the daring anti-dating-app manifesto deck, owner-directed) is in production with verified stats only.
Google reality check: keepitup.social is not in Google's index yet. Search Console verification is the gate (owner action, ~10 min).

agents.name: standup-scribe
agents.metric: report live on HQ by 06:15 daily
agents.note: FAILED first unattended delivery — not its fault (no write access), but the runbook now requires it to print the full report JSON as its final message so a failed push still delivers via the run log.

agents.name: Builder pool
agents.metric: tickets shipped w/ full DoD; 0 broken deploys
agents.note: 4 builds in 24h (poster v2, map picker, click analytics, poster v1) — all full-DoD green, zero deploy breakage. Strongest performers.

agents.name: social-media-growth v2
agents.note: Batch 09 answered all 13 owner comments; batch 10 manifesto in production. Corrections trending down under contract v2.

agents.name: CEO (Claude)
agents.note: Caught the canonical-domain root cause; held the no-real-player-photo and no-competitor-defamation lines under daring-content pressure.

directions.title: Grant the cloud environment write access to the repo
directions.detail: The 06:00 standup fired on time but its push was refused (403 — read-only checkout). One click in your claude.ai environment settings (grant push for emrullah-yildiz/sport-date) makes the daily standup self-delivering from tomorrow.
directions.recommendation: Approve = you'll do it today; the scribe also now prints its report in the run log as a fallback either way.

directions.title: Verify keepitup.social in Google Search Console
directions.detail: The site is not in Google's index at all yet. Verification (~10 min, your Google account) + sitemap submission is the gate to appearing for any search, including brand searches.
directions.recommendation: Approve = you'll verify this week; DNS method preferred, or send the CEO the HTML-tag token to ship.

directions.title: Review batch 09 + the manifesto when it lands
directions.detail: 10 poster-branded revisions (answering every comment you left) sit in Pending with finished images, including the micro-drama slides you asked to see. The daring manifesto deck (batch 10) lands there next with verified stats.
directions.recommendation: Approve = you'll review today; approved image posts schedule same-day.
